Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 209 

MH_PIHP_MOS 

LABEL: Mental Health (MH) Prepaid Inpatient Health Plan (PIHP) Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a mental health (MH) Prepaid Inpatient Health Plan 
(PIHP) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MH_PIHP_MOS 

LONG NAME: MH_PIHP_MOS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Managed Care 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
